name: Peach Chutney (Rice)
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar (2 to 3 ounces) Crystallized Ginger, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a 2-quart microwavable casserole.
2. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 10 to 12 minutes, stirring after 5 minutes until the peaches are transparent and the chutney is syrupy.
3. Refrigerate until chilled.
4. Store in refrigerator up to 2 weeks.
